title: 阪神JFの後に・自分の意志で

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City finishes the Hanshin J.F. to roaring
cheers from the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hears them call her "pretty" and "beautiful."
Having failed to change their perspective, she
grows irritated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They want to see her win the Triple Tiara not to
celebrate her running, but for the pretty picture.
Pandering to that would make her a doll with no
agency.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wanting to decide her own path, she chooses to
run for the Classic Triple Crown. First up will be
the Satsuki Sho!
